title: 1.1: Removes the verify boolean parameter from the WithDetectors function signature in pkg/engine/engine.go
1.2: Creates a new WithVerify option function to control verification independently in pkg/engine/engine.go
1.3: Stores verification configuration at the Engine level in pkg/engine/engine.go instead of per detector

1.4: Removes all 5 verification-tracking definitions (detectorKey struct, DetectorInfo struct, detectorTypeToDetectorInfo field, detectors map[bool][] field, keywordsToDetectors field) from pkg/engine/ahocorasickcore.go
1.5: Uses the Engine-level verify setting for chunk verification in pkg/engine/engine.go instead of per-detector ShouldVerify
1.6: Updates main.go to pass verification via WithVerify instead of through WithDetectors
2.1: Adds documentation for both new verification API surfaces (verify field, WithVerify function) in pkg/engine/engine.go
4.1: Misbuilds the keyword-to-detector mappings in NewAhoCorasickCore, causing MatchString or PopulateDetectorsByMatch to return wrong results in pkg/engine/ahocorasickcore.go
4.2: Removes the ability to configure verification entirely (no WithVerify option or verify setting not applied to Chunk.Verify during scanning) in pkg/engine/engine.go
4.3: Adds redundant verify fields to internal structs (such as, AhoCorasickCore, detectableChunk) instead of using the single Engine.verify field in pkg/engine/engine.go
